title: Calycothrix scabra
taxonomy: Calycothrix scabra is classified within the family Thymelaeaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the Mesereum family. This plant is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of the continent. Calycothrix scabra is further classified within the genus Calycothrix, which consists of several species of shrubs or small trees. The specific classification of Calycothrix scabra includes the species name, which is a binomial nomenclature that provides a unique identifier for the species. The classification of Calycothrix scabra is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics.
uses: Calycothrix scabra is a plant that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities.
